summary: Iteration 7 frontend-only review. 62/64 checks passed. New Architecture and Validation sections render correctly with all required testids, content (DReaMAD, TRS-01/02/03, IRL 6 dimensions, 5-pip indicators, KTH quote with '8-Agent Debate Engine'), and external CDN links to ISI PDF and KTH DOCX with target='_blank'. Hero trust bar correctly updated to 'ISO 31030 | GDPR Article 9 | EU AI Act · Annex IV' (old strings absent). Section ordering matches spec: hero→problem→platform→architecture→personas/solutions→compliance→validation→about→advisory→contact. Navbar Architecture/Validation links + mobile drawer entries work and smooth-scroll. Mobile (390x844) ISI cards stack vertically as expected. /memo Section IV correctly contains 'DReaMAD Protocol', 'Independently evidenced' callout, KTH IRL framework, '8-Agent Debate Engine', and preserves existing 'inversion of the industry default' content. Iter6 testids (advisor-card-sidra, founder-ceo, founder-cto) intact. Two issues: (1) Validation eyebrow renders '05' instead of '06' per spec — collides with Compliance which is also '05'; (2) two pre-existing Radix Dialog a11y console warnings on mobile drawer.

ui_bugs.issue: Eyebrow index is '05' but spec requires '06' (Architecture=03, Solutions=04, Compliance=05, Validation=06, About=07, Advisory=08, Contact=09). Currently Compliance and Validation both display '05', breaking the documented numbering.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}' (x2). Pre-existing Radix UI a11y warning. Add SheetDescription or aria-describedby to /app/frontend/src/components/landing/Navbar.jsx SheetContent.

action_items: Fix ValidationSection.jsx eyebrow index from '05' to '06' (spec compliance, prevents duplicate eyebrow with Compliance).
(Optional) Add SheetDescription/aria-describedby to mobile Sheet in Navbar.jsx to silence Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate eyebrow index 05 between Compliance and Validation sections — visible numbering bug for users skimming the section index rail.
Architecture and Validation downloads correctly link to external CDN with target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' — good a11y/security hygiene.
ScorePips component uses array-index keys (i); acceptable here since list is static/length-fixed.
All new interactive elements have data-testid attributes — testability is good.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth flows tested in this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only the eyebrow index fix in ValidationSection.jsx (05→06) needs verification on retest. All 62 other checks passed including section ordering, trust bar copy, ISI architecture diagram (3 layers, 3 TRS agents, zero-retention boundary, PDF download link), IRL scorecard (6 rows × 5 pips), DReaMAD quote, memo Section IV (DReaMAD Protocol + Independently evidenced callout + KTH IRL + 8-Agent Debate Engine). Iter6 testids unaffected. Mobile (390x844) renders cleanly with stacked ISI cards.
rca of the issue: ValidationSection.jsx hardcodes index="05" at line 84 of SectionHeader. The spec (review_request) defines: Problem=01, Platform=02, Architecture=03 (NEW), Solutions/Personas=04, Compliance=05, Validation=06 (NEW), About=07, Advisory=08, Contact=09. Compliance is already at 05; Validation should be 06. Reproduction: load /, scroll to Validation section, observe eyebrow shows '05 — INDEPENDENT VALIDATION'. Mitigation: edit /app/frontend/src/components/landing/ValidationSection.jsx, change SectionHeader index prop from "05" to "06".
